text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 92 

PRVDR_DEATH_DT 

LABEL: Provider Date of Death 

DESCRIPTION: Date of death of the provider, if applicable. Variable is populated only for individual providers ; 
derived from the same monthly base record as the most recent value of the provider entity type code 
(PRVDR_ENT_TYPE_CD) in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_DEATH_DT 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_DEATH_DT 

TYPE:
